title: The Beginning of Possibility
overview: Reiji Mukudori enters an immersive VRMMO that's more realistic than he thought possible. Luckily, his big brother Shu is there to show him the ropes.

title: Tomb Labyrinth
overview: Ray takes the perfect job and goes grinding for levels, but winds up geting more than he bargained for. A trip to the Tomb Labyrinth proves fruitful.

title: Superior
overview: Ray and friends see how the player killers--most of them--were shut down and eliminated. The party chooses a quest to complete on their way to Gideon.

title: Like a Flag Flying the Reversal
overview: The party soon realizes it'll take brains, brawn, and maybe a little something extra to save a group of tians from the Great Miasmic Ogre, Gardranda.

title: La Porte de l'Enfer
overview: Overhearing a young woman's pleas, Ray winds up taking on a quest with fellow Master Hugo Lesseps to rescue children from a truly distasteful gang.

title: Beyond the Radix Point
overview: Ray and Nemesis fight the monster responsble for the zombification of the captured children: Maise, a Lich hell-bent on becoming immortal.

title: Showdown City
overview: Marie invites Ray to Gideon to attend the Clash of the Superiors, an all-out arena battle between two mighty warriors. Figaro and Shu chat in private.

title: Clash of the Superiors
overview: It's Figaro the Endless Chain versus Master Jiangshi Xinyu in a high-speed, no-holds-barred bout--and as it turns out, that's just the opening act.

title: The Beginning of Madness
overview: It might be up to Ray and his fellow newbies to defend Gideon against Franklin, who's taken a princess hostage and unleashed monsters on the populace.

title: The Movement on the Board
overview: Marie finds herself up against a deadly talented Composer and his malevolent musicians, while Franklin reveals a brand-new and highly lethal monster.

title: The Right Arm of the Victor
overview: Rook goes all-out against Hugo as Ray tackles mad Franklin's RSK, a grotesque creature tailor-made to avenge its creator as Ray's perfect opponent.

title: King of Destruction
overview: The battle against Franklin is far from over as he reveals trick after trick he'd stashed up his sleeve. The King of Destruction comes in with a bang.

title: Those Who Bind the Possibilities
overview: The final battle of Dr. Franklin vs. the rest of Infinite Dendrogram as the finale piece de resistance. And now it's up to Ray and Shu, the Superior Master King of Destruction to finish this once and for all.
